text.title: User Research at Scale Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Week not in ISO format; finding lacks session_count/segment_count/hitl_passed; evidence_count below 50 floor; throughput/codebook_delta/hitl_escalations absent.

list.pattern: Coding pipeline auto-adding new codes without HITL review.
PII transcript processed through a non-ZDR endpoint.
